steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: The question asks: of all students who completed internships in 2010, what fraction were from Valley High School?

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: From the table, Valley 2010 = 65. Foothill 2010 = 75. Total 2010 = 65 + 75 = 140.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• A: 10/140 — The numerator 10 does not correspond to any 2010 value. Eliminated.
  • B: 65/140 — Valley 2010 = 65 out of total 2010 = 140. B is correct.
  • C: 75/140 — 75 is Foothill's count, not Valley's. Eliminated.
  • D: 65/75 — This compares Valley to Foothill only, not to the total. Eliminated.
